auth.addressDescription: Fill in your address so you can order right away. You can also do this later.
auth.photoDescription: Upload a profile photo so other users can recognize you.

auth.focusBuyingDesc: I want to buy cards and bid on auctions
auth.focusSellingDesc: I want to sell my cards on the marketplace

auth.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue
auth.welcomeSubtitle: Your account has been created. Here are a few things to get you started:
auth.welcomeAuctionsDesc: Bid on Pokémon cards from other collectors
auth.welcomeMarketplaceDesc: Buy cards directly at a fixed price
auth.welcomeCreateListingDesc: Sell your own cards to the community
auth.welcomeShippingDesc: Configure your shipping options as a seller

home.heroSubtitle: Buy, sell and auction Pokémon cards on the platform made by collectors, for collectors.
home.quickActions: What would you like to do?
home.featureSecureDesc: All transactions go through an internal balance with escrow protection. No direct payments between buyers and sellers.
home.featureAntiSnipeDesc: Bids in the last 2 minutes automatically extend the auction. Fair for everyone.
home.featureWalletDesc: Pay securely via your platform balance with escrow. Your money is only released after delivery confirmation.
home.featureCommunityDesc: Join a growing community of Pokémon collectors who trade cards daily.
home.whyCardsCenterDesc: The platform built for Pokémon card collectors and traders.
home.step1Desc: Register for free and set up your profile. Ready in under a minute.
home.step2Desc: Browse auctions, claimsales and listings, or list your own cards.
home.step3Desc: Bid on auctions, buy directly or claim individual cards. Secure via our escrow system.
home.ctaDesc: Create a free account and discover thousands of Pokémon cards.
home.pricingTitle: Choose the plan that fits you
home.pricingSubtitle: Start for free or upgrade for unlimited features. Transparent pricing, no surprises.
home.planFreeDesc: Perfect for getting started with buying and selling
home.featuredTooltip: These items are promoted by sellers via a spotlight upgrade.

auction.title: Title
auction.reservePriceHelp: Hidden minimum price. The auction is only valid if this amount is reached.
auction.buyNowPriceHelp: Buyers can skip the auction immediately for this price. Disappears when bids reach 75% of this price.
auction.runnerUpEnabled: Roll over to runner-up if winner does not pay
auction.runnerUpEnabledHelp: If the winner doesn't pay within 5 days, the highest non-failed bidder is automatically rolled to and given a fresh deadline. Otherwise the auction closes unpaid.
auction.buyNowConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to buy this item for €{price}? This amount will be deducted from your balance immediately.
auction.buyNowConfirmPartial: Are you sure you want to buy this item for €{price}? 40% of this amount (€{reserve}) will be held until you complete payment. You have 5 days to pay.
auction.autoBidExplain: Set a maximum amount. The system will automatically bid the minimum needed to stay the highest bidder, up to your maximum.
auction.selectType: What do you want to auction?
auction.multiCardDesc: Auction multiple individual cards in one lot
auction.collectionDesc: Auction a full collection or bundle of cards
auction.sealedProductDesc: Auction an unopened product (booster, ETB, tin, etc.)
auction.otherDesc: Auction playmats, binders, figures and more
auction.upsellSpotlightDesc: Your auction is featured on the homepage
auction.upsellHighlightDesc: Stand out at the top of the category list
auction.upsellUrgentDesc: An eye-catching "Closing Soon!" label on your auction
auction.photoRecommend: We recommend adding at least 2 photos.
auction.photoTipSingleCard: Photograph the front and back of the card
auction.photoTipMultiCard: Take photos of all cards, preferably per card
auction.photoTipCollection: Take an overview photo and detail shots of key cards
auction.photoTipSealed: Photograph the product from multiple angles
auction.photoTipOther: Add clear photos of the item
auction.sponsoredTooltip: These auctions are promoted by sellers and appear at the top.
auction.balanceReservedInfo: €{amount} of your balance is reserved for bids on other auctions.
auction.bidTooHighWarning: You don't have enough balance for this bid. Your maximum bid is €{max}. Top up your balance to bid higher.
auction.noBalanceTitle: Make a deposit to place bids
auction.noBalanceMessage: You need at least 40% of your bid amount as balance to place a valid bid.
auction.bidExceedsBalanceWarning: Your bid exceeds your deposited balance. Consider <link>topping up your balance</link> if you plan to keep bidding on this lot.

claimsale.title: Title
claimsale.publishWarning: After publishing, you can edit, add and delete items while the claimsale is live.
claimsale.confirmPublish: Are you sure you want to publish this claimsale?
claimsale.confirmClose: Are you sure you want to close this claimsale? Available items will be removed.
claimsale.confirmClaimAllDesc: Are you sure you want to claim all {count} available items? You have 15 minutes to check out.

wallet.depositInstructions: Transfer the amount to the account below. Your balance will be credited after receipt.
wallet.bankTransferInstructions: Transfer the desired amount to the account below using your personal reference code. Your balance will be credited within 1-2 business days.
wallet.referenceWarning: Always include your reference code with the transfer. Without it, we cannot link your payment to your account.
wallet.idealComingSoonDescription: We are working on a direct iDEAL integration so your balance is credited in seconds. In the meantime, use a bank transfer.
wallet.pendingPaymentsDescription: You have won auctions that still require payment. Top up your balance and pay before the deadline.
wallet.availableBalanceHint: This amount is available for purchases and bids.
wallet.reservedBalanceHint: 40% of your active bids is reserved as a guarantee.
wallet.heldBalanceHint: Amounts waiting for buyers to confirm delivery.

escrow.title: What is escrow?
escrow.description: Escrow is a secure system where the paid amount is held by Cards Center as an independent third party. The money is not sent directly to the seller, but safely held until the buyer confirms that the package has been received in good condition. This protects both buyers and sellers in every transaction.
escrow.step1Desc: The purchase amount is deducted from the buyer's balance.
escrow.step2Desc: The amount is securely held in an escrow account. No one can access it in the meantime.
escrow.step3Desc: The seller ships the item to the buyer. The funds remain safely in escrow.
escrow.step4Desc: Once the buyer confirms receipt, the funds are immediately released to the seller.
escrow.disputeDesc: If the package doesn't arrive or is damaged, you can open a dispute. Cards Center will mediate and can refund the amount.
escrow.autoRelease: The amount is automatically released after 30 days if no dispute has been opened.

stats.upgradeCta: Upgrade to PRO or UNLIMITED for advanced statistics
stats.lockedDescription: Get access to advanced seller statistics, revenue charts and activity insights.

profile.ibanChangeWarning: Heads up: after changing your IBAN you can't change it again for {days} days (anti-fraud).

shipping.mailboxWarning: Make sure your item fits in a mailbox package!
shipping.mailboxWarningDetail: Note: you selected mailbox shipping. Make sure all items you sell actually fit through a mailbox. With multiple items per order this can be tricky — consider also offering a parcel option.

shipping.requireNonLetterMethod: You must offer at least one parcel or mailbox parcel option alongside letter mail.
shipping.selectAtLeastOneMethod: Select at least one shipping method.
shipping.signedRecommended: Signed delivery is recommended for this amount for extra protection.
shipping.signedRequiredThreshold: Signed delivery (with signature) is required for orders above €{amount}.
shipping.signedRequiredInternational: Signed delivery (with signature) is required for international shipments.
shipping.sellingCountriesDescription: Choose which countries you ship to. Buyers outside your region won't see your items.

disputes.title: My Disputes
disputes.openDisputeDescription: Describe your issue as clearly as possible. Add evidence (photos) if available.
disputes.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail (minimum 20 characters)...
disputes.cannotDisputeYet: You cannot open a dispute for this order yet.
disputes.disputeAlreadyExists: A dispute has already been opened for this order.
disputes.explainOpen: The seller has 7 days to respond. If there is no response, the dispute will be automatically resolved in your favor.
disputes.explainResponded: The seller has responded. You can accept the response, make a counter-proposal, or escalate the dispute.
disputes.explainEscalated: The dispute has been escalated to an admin. An admin will review the dispute and make a decision.
disputes.resolutionNoRefund: No refund — in favor of the seller.
disputes.sellerResponsePlaceholder: Describe your side of the story (minimum 20 characters)...
disputes.acceptResponseHint: You accept the sellers explanation and the dispute will be closed without a refund.
disputes.requestRefundHint: The dispute will be escalated to an admin for review.
disputes.proposePartialRefundHintBuyer: Propose an amount as a compromise. The seller can accept this.
disputes.proposePartialRefundHintSeller: Propose an amount as a compromise. The buyer can accept this.
disputes.acceptProposalHintBuyer: If you accept, you will receive €{amount} back.
disputes.acceptProposalHintSeller: If you accept, €{amount} will be refunded to the buyer.
disputes.proposalPendingSelfBuyer: You proposed €{amount}. Waiting for the seller to respond.
disputes.proposalPendingSelfSeller: You proposed €{amount}. Waiting for the buyer to respond.
disputes.escalateDescription: If you cannot reach an agreement, both parties can escalate the dispute to an admin. Both parties must agree.
disputes.escalateWaiting: You agreed to escalation. Waiting for the other party.
disputes.escalateBothAccepted: Both parties agreed. An admin will review the dispute.
disputes.buyerReviewDeadline: Respond before {date}. After this date the dispute will be automatically resolved.

buyback.title: Sell Calculator
buyback.subtitle: Sell your Pokémon cards to Cards Center
buyback.collectionDesc: Sell valuable singles — price based on 85% of the current market value
buyback.pricingDisclaimerBody: The displayed buyback price is an estimate based on current market data. Price errors can occur.
buyback.bulkDesc: Sell large quantities — fixed prices per category
buyback.step1Desc: Search and select the cards you want to sell using our calculator.
buyback.step2Desc: Review your selection, choose your payout method and submit your request. Ship the cards to Cards Center.
buyback.step3Desc: We inspect the cards for condition (Near Mint) and centering.
buyback.step4Desc: After approval, you receive the payout to your bank account or as store credit.
buyback.conditionNM: Only Near Mint cards are accepted
buyback.conditionCentering: Cards must not be clearly off-center
buyback.conditionPricing: Buyback price is 85% of the Marktprijs
buyback.conditionEra: Only cards from the XY series (2014) and newer
buyback.conditionPayout: Payout via bank transfer or store credit (5% bonus)
buyback.searchPlaceholder: Search for a card by name or number...

buyback.bulkNoticeDesc: Use the bulk calculator to sell cards in bulk at fixed prices.
